mapper.select: SELECT t.*, m.model_name AS process_name FROM sys_flow_task t LEFT JOIN sys_flow_model m ON t.process_def_key = m.model_key WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId}

SELECT t.*, m.model_name AS process_name FROM sys_flow_task t LEFT JOIN sys_flow_model m ON t.process_def_key = m.model_key WHERE t.task_id = #{taskId} OR t.id = #{taskId} ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.task_id = #{taskId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END LIMIT 1

SELECT t.*, m.model_name AS process_name FROM sys_flow_task t LEFT JOIN sys_flow_model m ON t.process_def_key = m.model_key WHERE t.due_date IS NOT NULL AND t.due_date <= #{now} AND t.status IN (0, 1) ORDER BY t.due_date ASC, t.create_time ASC
